# Duration: 20.7s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Holly! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started! Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it! Reply HELP if you have any questions
Partner: HELP
